current_external_evidence: Only x-user-id header hints ownership; no auth middleware in api/app.py
target_design: Require backend auth/session before any designer action
notes: Target must not trust the client header.

current_external_evidence: Adjust endpoint only compares requested_by vs x-user-id
target_design: Role-aware backend checks for create/adjust/cancel/download
notes: Ownership is not a substitute for RBAC.

current_external_evidence: No dedicated designer rate limit found
target_design: Per-user and per-provider throttles on create/adjust/download-url
notes: Needed for abuse/cost control.

current_external_evidence: No designer audit writes found
target_design: Audit create, adjust, cancel, artifact mint, download
notes: Must be persisted in backend audit log.

current_external_evidence: requested_by compared to x-user-id only on adjust
target_design: Enforce owner checks on every job mutation/read of private assets
notes: Create/status/download paths still need ownership enforcement.

current_external_evidence: Supabase metadata has requested_by but no central ownership service
target_design: Artifact records must be owned by job/user and validated on access
notes: Blocked until M1 artifact contract exists as implementation.

current_external_evidence: .env.example keeps provider keys server-side; app.py reads env in backend only
target_design: Backend adapter selects provider/model; frontend never sees keys
notes: Keep env secrets off VITE_*.

current_external_evidence: Frontend docs point to /banners JSON API; no direct provider call surfaced in frontend search
target_design: Frontend only calls /api/v1/designer routes
notes: Preserve backend-owned boundary.

current_external_evidence: select_template() resolves only templates_library/{canal}/{kv}
target_design: Allowlist derived from backend catalog only
notes: Good foundation; keep server-owned.

current_external_evidence: form-options returns catalog from templates, but JSON input still accepts raw strings
target_design: Backend validates channels/KVs/options against allowlists
notes: JSON and multipart payloads need explicit allowlist checks.

current_external_evidence: Pydantic models validate required text fields and file extensions
target_design: Strict schema + length/charset restrictions + redaction
notes: Free-form prompt content remains broad.

current_external_evidence: Exceptions often bubble raw messages in api/app.py and job_service.py
target_design: Redact provider/tool output and return safe summaries
notes: Important for provider abuse and leak prevention.

current_external_evidence: Retry logic exists, but explicit request/stream timeout policy is not exposed
target_design: Hard timeouts per provider call and per job step
notes: Use server-side time budgets.

current_external_evidence: No request body size gate found
target_design: Cap multipart/body size and upload size
notes: Needed for image uploads and prompt abuse.

current_external_evidence: External upload only checks extension (.png/.jpg/.jpeg)
target_design: Validate pixel dimensions and file size before processing
notes: Extension-only checks are not enough.

current_external_evidence: Outputs are PNG; persona input is restricted to image formats
target_design: Permit only declared output formats per template/job
notes: Target should codify output format and preview policy.

current_external_evidence: Download route returns local file or redirect directly
target_design: Signed URLs or authenticated artifact download only
notes: Public /files exposure is not safe for target.

current_external_evidence: Local outputs are mounted at /files and public; Supabase storage is optional
target_design: Private artifact storage with retention and cleanup
notes: Blocked on Artifact M1 implementation.

current_external_evidence: Supabase signed URLs exist when enabled; otherwise local public file URL
target_design: Download-url minted server-side from Artifact M1
notes: Current local public URLs are not enough.

current_external_evidence: Raw exception text is frequently returned/logged
target_design: Sanitize provider/internal errors before API response
notes: Avoid leaking stack traces or provider details.

current_external_evidence: No explicit abuse note or quota policy in API
target_design: User/job quotas and provider budget policy
notes: Needed before opening provider-backed generation.

current_external_evidence: Retry loops and planner toggles exist, but no user quota policy
target_design: Quota, per-job caps, and provider fallback policy
notes: Must be enforced server-side.

current_external_evidence: Safety retries and prompt-shaping docs exist
target_design: Explicit content policy gate before provider calls
notes: Should be a backend decision, not frontend input.

current_external_evidence: Logging exists in main.py/app.py/job_service.py
target_design: Structured logs + metrics for jobs/provider/artifacts
notes: Add audit-specific observability in target.
